title: HLL Procurement Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: HLL Lifecare (HLL) Procurement Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 19-05-2026 on the official website. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the HLL Procurement Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 37 years SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates will be eligible for relaxation as per Government of India directives.

qualification.education_qualification: Any Degree/ D Pharm / B Pharm
qualification.details: Any Degree/ D Pharm / B Pharm

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HLL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
